Kimi vs Doubao

Compare Kimi and Doubao: free credits, features, and ratings. Which one is right for you?

Kimi

By Moonshot AI, Kimi K2.6 focuses on coding and agent capabilities. 13-hour non-stop coding, 300 sub-agents in parallel, SWE-Bench Pro score of 58.6. Free tier includes daily credits for chat and light coding tasks.

Pros

  • ✓K2.6 coding performance near Claude Sonnet
  • ✓Open-weight model, self-hostable
  • ✓Free credits daily
  • ✓Massive 2M context window
  • ✓Agent Swarm for parallel tasks
  • ✓Accessible in China without VPN

Cons

  • ✗Free tier limited, heavy use requires payment
  • ✗K2-Thinking mode is slow
  • ✗Complex reasoning below top closed-source models
  • ✗API pricing adds up for heavy use

Key Features

K2.6 coding + agent modelAgent Swarm: 300 parallel sub-agents13-hour non-stop coding2M character context windowWeb search with real-time infoKimi Code coding assistantKimi Claw AI agentDeep Research modeSlides/Websites/Docs/Sheets generation
View Details →

Doubao

ByteDance's AI assistant. Basic features are free, but recent controversy over charging has eroded user trust. Free tier still includes AI image generation.

Pros

  • ✓ByteDance ecosystem
  • ✓Multimodal
  • ✓Fast response

Cons

  • ✗Average creativity
  • ✗Complex tasks not as good
  • ✗Started charging May 2026

Key Features

Doubao model poweredMulti-turn chatImage understandingCode generationDocument summarySearch enhancedFree to use
View Details →
